title: Add search group

posts.author: daniel (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please add the search per group functionality so when we’re setting the Dependencies - Predecessor to be able to search on the groups as well not only on the item.

Let’s say the items are the same in each group; I have to make a search on the item and then scroll down to the group project where I want to set the dependencies. Imagine where you have 100+ projects how inconvenient that is as to scroll through all the projects just to pick the predecessor item.

Would not be a bad idea where the dependencies are set by default to have it per previous item in the said group.

See in the recording:
